backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor that includes the MixinStorage blob-storage mixin to compose the backend canister.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming the addition of the Google Search Console verification file at frontend/public/google38eb840a952aed49.html with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key changes.
frontend/.env.production: Production environment file setting DFX_NETWORK to 'ic' and NODE_ENV to 'production' for ICP mainnet deployments.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS base styles defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark mode color themes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with comprehensive SEO meta tags, Open Graph, Twitter Card, JSON-LD structured data, and Google site verification for Rama's Home Foods.
frontend/public/google38eb840a952aed49.h: Google Search Console site ownership verification file served at the root URL path.
frontend/public/robots.txt: Robots.txt allowing all crawlers and pointing to the sitemap URL.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap listing all major page sections of ramasHomefoods.com with last-modified dates, change frequencies, and priorities.
frontend/README.md: Deployment and development documentation for Rama's Home Foods ICP website, covering prerequisites, local dev, and mainnet deployment steps.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component managing basket state and rendering all page sections (Navbar, Hero, Products, etc.) with a BasketSummary overlay.
frontend/src/components/AboutUs.tsx: About Us section component displaying the brand story, quality pillars (RO Water, No Preservatives, etc.), and a values grid with accessible semantic markup.
frontend/src/components/BasketSummary.ts: Fixed bottom-right collapsible basket panel showing items with kg quantities, per-kg pricing, a running total, and a WhatsApp order CTA.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Renders the Contact section with business info, address, phone/WhatsApp/email links, operating hours, quality highlights, and an embedded Google Maps link for Rama's Home Foods.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWhatsApp: A fixed floating WhatsApp button with pulse animation and a hover tooltip that links to the business WhatsApp number.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, contact details, WhatsApp/Zomato order buttons, and a sitemap dialog modal.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with background image, brand logo, headline, star rating, and CTA buttons for WhatsApp ordering and scrolling to products/about.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed responsive navbar with smooth-scroll navigation links, active section highlighting on scroll, and a WhatsApp order CTA button with a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/Offers.tsx: Displays special offers including discount cards for new customers, bulk orders, and subscriptions, plus a prominent Zomato online ordering banner.
frontend/src/components/Products.tsx: Defines a list of 5 South Indian batter products and renders them as cards with quantity selectors and an add-to-basket action.
frontend/src/components/Reviews.tsx: Displays a grid of 4 hardcoded customer testimonials with star ratings, quote text, and customer initials avatars.
frontend/src/components/Sitemap.tsx: Renders a navigable site map panel listing all page sections with icons and descriptions, scrolling to each section on click.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUs.tsx: Displays a dark-themed section with 9 feature cards highlighting quality, hygiene, and delivery attributes of the business.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global CSS with Google Fonts imports, Tailwind directives, and a warm spice/terracotta design system using oklch CSS variables for both light and dark modes, plus reusable component classes and animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the theme with oklch-based semantic color tokens, brand palette (spice, saffron, cream, ink), custom fonts, border radii, box shadows, and typography/animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state at version 3, recording that a Google Search Console verification file (google38eb840a952aed49.html) was added to the frontend public directory as the sole existing feature.
